old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-oqv7.6","title":"Add R1 Neo Renode model","description":"Compose an R1 Neo model using nRF52840, SX1262, USB/BLE model components, and board-specific SPIM/GPIO/power-hold wiring with stable identity.","acceptance_criteria":"Canonical R1 Neo gateway and puck firmware reach BLE/CoAP readiness and independently observed simulator TX; provisional reset, GNSS, bootloader, and power timing remain explicitly physical-validation items.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T19:40:36.310939Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-16T19:40:36.310939Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-oqv7.6","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-oqv7","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-16T19:40:36.428655Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-oqv7.6","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-oqv7.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-07-16T19:44:14.465187Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-oqv7.6","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-oqv7.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-07-16T19:44:15.154149Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: Added R1 Neo Renode model (muzi/r1_neo) using SX1262.cs + GPIO1 wiring matching dts, BLE.cs updates, nRF USBD override in repl, startup repl. Updated tests, scripts. Renode sims pass.
